audit_summary.objective: Complete audit of root-cause related datasets

root_cause_datasets.notes: Primary root cause dataset with 5 binary labels, already migrated to PRCI_v2

related_mental_health_datasets.notes: Anxiety detection dataset, binary labels, highly imbalanced (3712 positive, 5 negative)
Depression detection dataset, binary labels, balanced distribution (3889 negative, 3761 positive)

label_definitions.notes: 6 root cause labels defined, but 'overwhelmed' excluded from modeling

unlabeled_text_sources.notes: Intake system prompt template, no user data

key_findings.semi_supervised_potential: high - 11,367 additional mental health samples available
data_quality_notes: Anxiety dataset is severely imbalanced (99.9% positive)
Root cause dataset is small but clean with multi-label structure
No additional root cause labeled data found in legacy repository

immediate_actions: Proceed with current 60-sample root cause dataset for initial modeling
Consider data augmentation techniques for root cause dataset
Explore transfer learning from larger anxiety/depression datasets
strategic_considerations: Semi-supervised learning could leverage 11,367 additional mental health samples
Multi-task learning approach could benefit from related datasets
Data collection priority: expand root cause labeled samples
